title: Add preflight checks and json-only output for score dataset curation CLI

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented preflight+json-only for score dataset curation commands. Added shared preflight gate in scores CLI: requires AMPLIFY_STORAGE_DATASETS_BUCKET_NAME and resolves final output classes before balanced curation (dataset-curate balance path and dataset-curate-vetted). Added --json-only flag to dataset-curate and dataset-curate-vetted; command body logs are suppressed and final payload stays JSON. On failures with --json-only, CLI now emits {"error": "..."} and exits non-zero. Tests: pytest -q plexus/cli/score/scores_dataset_curate_test.py (11 passed), pytest -q plexus/cli/dataset/curation_test.py (17 passed), py_compile scores.py.
